title: Spermacoce evenia
intro: Spermacoce evenia, also known as "False Buttonweed," is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, Spermacoce evenia has been used in medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial, antipyretic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal effects. In herbal medicine, Spermacoce evenia is often prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to create infusions and decoctions for treating various health conditions.
